name: 3rd Shot Drop RI at Kings Crossing Golf Club
description: 3rd Shot Drop RI at Kings Crossing Golf Club is a place to play pickleball in North Kingstown, RI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, food, trainers or lessons, water, and a pro shop or equipment store. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Clarke Pointe Park
description: Clarke Pointe Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Narragansett, RI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Cristofaro Recreation Park
description: Cristofaro Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Narragansett, RI. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Curtis Corner Middle School
description: Curtis Corner Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wakefield, RI. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Davisville Middle School
description: Come play pickleball at Davisville Middle School in North Kingstown, RI! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Lil' Rhody Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Lil' Rhody Pickleball in North Kingstown, RI! There are 7 acrylic courts. 5 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, water, and restrooms.

description: Come play pickleball at Ninigret Park in Charlestown, RI! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: South Kingstown Recreation Center
description:
Check our bi monthly schedule for drop in and court rentals schedule here https://www.southkingstownri.com/DocumentCenter/View/6550/Weekly-Schedule.

Drop in fees are $3/visit for South Kingstown residents and $6/visit for non residents.

For info on lessons and leagues, stop by the Recreation Center or call 401-284-1975.
fees: Fee required — Drop in fees are $3/visit for South Kingstown residents and $6/visit for non residents.
